TextENGNew: I slipped on my shoes and tapped the toes against the floor as I stepped outside, and Mion approached me timidly.
...Why on earth was she blushing now, of all times...?
``May I... link arms with you?``
...It was such a modest, humble request.
``...I don't mind.``
...The moment I gave my permission, her face lit up like a child who'd just been given a toy, and she took my arm.
``...Does it make you nervous... having your arm linked with mine?@k@vS02/03/130300502. Like maybe I'll suddenly put you in a joint lock, or something...?``
``...You two really do say the same things.@k@vS02/01/130101067. I'm not thinking that.@k@vS02/01/130101068. Not at all.``
Back when... nothing had gone wrong yet.
...Those nostalgic days of lively chaos at Angel Mort.
...I counted back on my fingers, and was stunned.@k It had been only a single week ago.
I had walked arm in arm with Shion then, too.
Walking arm in arm with Mion like this... it really brought home just how much they were twins.
...The pressure of her grip, the feel of her arm... the warmth, the pulse of blood flowing through living flesh -- it was all exactly the same.
``...............It seems Shion liked you too, Kei-chan.``
Under normal circumstances... I might have blushed and jumped back.
But right now... no matter what I heard, my heart remained calm.
``...You and Shion... you two got along well, didn't you...?``
``Well......... who knows.@k@vS02/03/130300505. ...Kei-chan, do you think your right hand and left hand get along?``
``Huh?@k@vS02/01/130101072. My right hand and left hand?@k@vS02/01/130101073. ...That's not really the kind of thing you'd describe in terms of getting along or not...``
``That's the kind of relationship we had.@k@vS02/03/130300507. One that can't be measured on any scale of getting along.``
...That didn't sound like it simply meant they were close.
``Just as everyone has a dominant hand, there's an undeniable difference in ability between the right and the left.``
``...If you only had one oven mitt, you'd put it on your dominant hand without a second thought, right?@k@vS02/03/130300510. I think there was that kind of difference between us.``
``But even so, nobody would ever think it's fine to lose their left hand.@k@vS02/03/130300512. ...It's that sort of hard-to-define relationship.``
``......Maybe... you were just too close to see it clearly.@k@vS02/01/130101076. ...I think it means you were actually very close.``
``...I'm an only child, so... the day before the festival...@k@vS02/01/130101078. Seeing you and Shion playing around together, I was genuinely envious.``

``......Isn't that just wanting what you can't have?@k@vS02/03/130300514. Sure, being twins was fun when we were little -- we'd trick people and have a good laugh.@k@vS02/03/130300515. But now that we've each developed such distinct personalities, it just gets in the way.``
Was she cursing her fate, or was she just embarrassed?@k ...Theirs was a sisterly bond that was hard to read from the outside.
Perhaps it wasn't a matter someone like me had any business prying into.
...Simply staying quiet and nodding gently was the best response I could offer.
Mion led me through the spacious grounds and toward the large, desolate forest we had seen on the way in.
...The fact that even a forest this large was part of the estate... was staggering.
``............What a massive forest.@k@vS02/01/130101080. It must have been a great playground when you were kids, huh?``
Mion fell silent, as though tracing back through her memories.
......I couldn't see into her mind... but I imagined she was remembering those carefree childhood days when the two sisters played together without any bad blood between them.
Each time the wind blew, the branches and leaves rustled gently against one another, producing a soft, murmuring sound like a stream.
...Mion remained silent for a long while.
She was retracing memories of the little sister... she had destroyed with her own hands.
I had no need to say anything about that.
...Just walking like this... arms linked... was enough.
...Mion suddenly stopped and turned to face me.
``............Shion is... still alive.``
``...Really?``
Mion stared hard into my eyes, then nodded quietly.

``............Yeah.@k@vS02/03/130300519. ...I'd kept her locked up, planning to give her the most gruesome death of anyone.@k@vS02/03/130300520. ......But even now, I never could think of how to do it.``
...Mion spoke as if she hated Shion... but deep down, she didn't truly despise her.
...So I reached over with my free hand and ruffled Mion's hair.
Mion hadn't saved only me.@k She had saved Shion too.
...Mion may have become a demon and led many people to their deaths.@k ...But she had fought against that demon... and managed to save two lives.
Mion let me pet her head, her eyes narrowing in a dreamy, contented smile...@k@|@y Then she gently untangled her arm from mine.
And quietly said,
``.........Come with me.@k@vS02/03/130300522. ...I want you to see all of my sins.@k@vS02/03/130300523. ...Though for you, Kei-chan... it may be the most painful thing you've ever witnessed.``
I sensed it instinctively.
...In there, the victims would almost certainly be laid out... every last one of them.
...To look upon them... would mean accepting the deaths of Rika-chan and Satoko.
And accepting... that my best friend had been the one responsible.

``............What's already happened is in the past.@k@vS02/03/130300525. ......You can choose not to look, Kei-chan.@k@vS02/03/130300526. If that's your choice, wait here.@k@vS02/03/130300527. ...I'll end everything myself.``
The ominous ring of those words made me flinch.
......Rena's words came flooding back to me.
Mion might not hand herself over to the law... she might choose to bring the curtain down on her own.
...I couldn't leave Mion alone.
...Besides, wasn't that why I was here -- to honor her last wish?
...Even if it was something I couldn't bear to accept... I would accept it.
...Even if I turned away from it... what had happened... had already... happened.
``............No matter what I see.``
``............To me, Mion Sonozaki... is the best friend I could ever have.@k@vS02/01/130101085. That will never change.@k@vS02/01/130101086. Not for as long as I live.``
A gust of wind swept through the treetops with a soft rush...
``............You and Rena both.@k@vS02/03/130300530. ......Why is it that you only say such cool things at times like these?``
Normally I would have deflected with some sarcastic quip... but not today.@k ...I simply answered with a smile.
Before long, Mion started walking again.@k ...Deeper and deeper into the thick forest.
After following a narrow trail that might have been an animal path for some time... we came upon a steep slope with a tunnel entrance reminiscent of a coal mine or bomb shelter.
It was surrounded by gentle slopes, constructed so that it would be hidden from the outside.
...Shadows of crows perched among the trees here and there.
...And the stench that had been assaulting my nose for a while now... was unmistakably seeping from inside.

``............If you want to turn back, now's the time.@k@vS02/03/130300532. I don't know what kind of person Mion Sonozaki is inside your heart, but...@k@vS02/03/130300533. If you go in there... that Mion will probably...............``
``She won't change.@k@vS02/01/130101088. I'll say it as many times as it takes.@k@vS02/01/130101089. ...Mion Sonozaki is the best friend I could ever have.``
I clenched both fists tight.
...Inside there was surely... a sight beyond anything I could imagine.
The kind of sight that... if I let my guard down for even a moment... might make me vomit.
But I would endure it.@k ...I would overcome this pain and suffering.@k ...Because no matter what... Mion is my greatest friend.
``............I'm nothing more than a demon... so I don't understand human feelings anymore.@k@vS02/03/130300535. ...But somehow... I think I understand why Mion fell in love with you.``

``...Don't talk about yourself like you're someone else.@k@vS02/01/130101091. You are Mion.@k@vS02/01/130101092. Not a demon.@k@vS02/01/130101093. ...You're a living, breathing human being, and you're my friend.``
...Mion made a gesture as if wiping her eyes, then placed her hand on the massive door at the tunnel entrance.
An imposing lock stood guard over it.
...Like the ritual storehouse, it seemed to demand absolute resolve from anyone who would enter.
The double doors swung open... and a wave of humid, putrid air rushed out along with a swarm of gnats.
It reminded me of when I'd left a crab's tank out on the balcony as a kid and accidentally killed it... and how awful the smell had been.
...If that was the smell of death... then this was unmistakably the same.
Inside it was pitch black, but when Mion flipped a switch, a bare bulb flickered on and cast its light.
The passageway was a labyrinth of wooden tunnels.

Along the way we passed spaces that resembled storehouses,@k areas that had been fashioned into living quarters,@k ...all of it suggesting the place had served as a bomb shelter and stockpile during the war.
...But it didn't feel like an abandoned bomb shelter that had simply been dug out and left. It carried a certain gravitas, as though it were a second Sonozaki estate built underground.
Despite walking through total darkness underground, the sound of cicadas drifting in through some ventilation shaft lent the place an eerie, surreal quality.

``...You saw what was inside the ritual storehouse, right?@k@vS02/03/130300537. That mountain of torture instruments.@k@vS02/03/130300538. ...Every one of them was created to enforce the strict codes of Onigafuchi Village.@k@vS02/03/130300539. They were tools for making examples of lawbreakers -- killing them in horrific ways as a warning to the rest.``
``............That was ages ago, though.``

``...Originally, Watanagashi -- the ritual of public punishment -- was overseen by all Three Families...@k@vS02/03/130300541. But with the decline of the Kimiyoshi and Furude families, and the changing of the times, carrying it out became extremely difficult.``
``...I can see why.@k@vS02/01/130101096. ...In modern Japan, you can't exactly get away with torturing people to death out in the open.``
``That's why... the Sonozaki family built this place.@k@vS02/03/130300543. ...A secret location... so the Watanagashi rite could continue, even in modern times.``
Mion opened a door that was conspicuously different from the rest...
......And beyond it...@k@|@y ......was unmistakably... a modern-day ritual storehouse......
``...There's... quite a collection, isn't there?@k@vS02/03/130300545. Some of these were actually brought here from the original storehouse.``
............Everything in the ritual storehouse had been rusted and coated in dust, lending it an air of unreality...@k But the things in here were different.
Every instrument was well maintained... kept in a state of perfect readiness.
Bladed implements gleamed at the edge, and spiked ones had their points honed sharp.
Perhaps in anticipation of blood splatter...@k the walls and floor were tiled like a bathroom... and at the bottom of a gentle slope, there was even a drain.
A coiled rubber hose was attached to a faucet along the wall, presumably for washing away the blood.
``...According to the writings of a head from long ago...@k@vS02/03/130300547. blood splatter makes quite an impact, despite being relatively easy on the victim.``
``...Watanagashi was a spectacle of deterrence, after all.@k@vS02/03/130300549. My ancestors devised all manner of performances.``
As she said this, Mion pointed deeper into the darkened chamber.
To my surprise, there was a tatami-floored room in the back... with a pile of cushions stacked in the corner.
``...It's the gallery.@k@vS02/03/130300551. Watanagashi was a spectacle meant as a warning, after all.@k@vS02/03/130300552. There'd be no point without an audience.``
I couldn't speak... nor could I think of a single thing to say.
...But if revealing all of this to me lightened Mion's burden even slightly, then I was prepared to listen for as long as she needed.

``Right here is where... ............I killed everyone.@k@vS02/03/130300554. ...There was no audience to watch... but I performed the Watanagashi well.@k@vS02/03/130300555. ...Well, I suppose there was one spectator.``
``...Me.@k@vS02/03/130300557. The demon inside me watched the entire time Mion carried out the Watanagashi.``
Mion let out a self-deprecating cackle.
...It was not a pleasant laugh.
``The cells are over there.``
``...Is Shion in there...?``
She gave a small nod.
......Mion's Watanagashi... would end today.
...I had to tell Shion she was safe, as quickly as possible.
...After all, at this very moment, she was surely trembling in terror, wondering when her turn would come.
A heavy door swung open, and from the echo alone I could tell the space beyond was immense.
Mion fumbled around in the darkness, and a handful of bare light bulbs flickered on here and there.
...As my eyes adjusted to the gloom, a vast cavern gradually revealed itself in the feeble light...
The walls here were bare, exposed rock, and the atmosphere was so bleak that 'bomb shelter' was the only fitting word...
Small rooms fitted with iron bars were carved into the rock face here and there, like wormholes dotting the surface of some enormous fruit.@k ...Each one was unmistakably a cell.
``.........Where is... everyone? Rika-chan and Satoko...?``
``...Their bodies?``
...I grimaced at how bluntly she said it.
``......Yeah.@k@vS02/01/130101103. ...That's right.@k@vS02/01/130101104. ...It's not right, leaving them in the dark like this.``
``............I didn't want bugs getting to them, so I threw them down the well.@k@vS02/03/130300561. .........Sorry.``
I couldn't even see their faces one last time...
...A fresh wave of regret surged through me -- regret for having confessed everything to Rika-chan.
If Mion hadn't added 'sorry' at the end, I might have hit her.
...Calm down, Keiichi Maebara...
...You said it yourself -- no matter what happens, Mion Sonozaki is your greatest friend!
``......Yeah... I said it...``
I spoke the words as if reminding myself.
Just then, one of the cells deeper in rattled its bars with a clang.
I noticed and looked up.
``Ke... Kei-chan?!@k@vS02/06/130600548. Is that you, Kei-chan?!``
I rushed over to the cell.
...Pale hands reached out through the gaps in the bars.@k ...It was Shion.
``Are you all right, Shion?!@k@vS02/01/130101110. Are you hurt...?!``
Shion's face crumpled as she let out a shriek.
...It was because Mion had appeared right behind me.@k ...Of course.@k ...Shion didn't know yet that it was all over.
``Calm down, Shion.@k@vS02/01/130101112. ...It's all over now.@k@vS02/01/130101113. ...All of it.``
I spoke in the calmest voice I could muster, trying to soothe the frantic Shion.
...But my words were drowned out by her screaming, unable to reach her...
``Shion.@k@vS02/03/130300563. ...How have you been enjoying yourself...?``
changeReason: Old translates ご機嫌はいかがだった as neutral 'How have you been'; new adds menacing undertone 'How have you been enjoying yourself' which better captures the sinister ご機嫌 in this torture context

TextENGNew: ``No more... please...!@k@vS02/06/130600551. No more!!@k@vS02/06/130600552. I don't want to watch anyone else die!!!@k@vS02/06/130600553. If you hate me... then just kill me!!!@k@vS02/06/130600554. I'm the one you hate, aren't I?!@k@vS02/06/130600555. Kill me, just kill me now!!@k@vS02/06/130600556. Siiiiiis!!!!``
``C-Calm down, Shion!@k@vS02/01/130101115. It's over now.@k@vS02/01/130101116. ...You're safe.@k@vS02/01/130101117. So please, calm down...``
Shion rattled the iron bars back and forth as she screamed... completely beside herself.
......I gave a small, helpless shrug and stepped aside for Mion.
...I realized that if Mion was the one who locked her in here... and Mion was the one who had terrified her this much... then only Mion could bring this nightmare to an end...
Mion spoke over my shoulder.@k Quietly.
``Relax.@k@vS02/03/130300565. I won't kill you.@k@vS02/03/130300566. ...Not yet, anyway.@k@vS02/03/130300567. ......Ku-ku-ku-ku-ku-ku-ku-ku-ku-ku-ku-ku...!!``
She burst into a bizarre, cackling laugh... as if trying to drive Shion even deeper into madness.
Triggered by that laugh... Shion began trembling violently... wailing as she shook the iron bars...

``Stoooooop!!!@k@vS02/06/130600558. Don't kill Kei-chaaaaan!!@k@vS02/06/130600559. Kei-chan has nothing to do with this, does he?!@k@vS02/06/130600560. If you're going to kill someone... kill me!!!@k@vS02/06/130600561. I can't stand watching anyone else... diiiiiiiiie!!!!``
``Ah-hahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah!!!``

``If you want to die that badly, I'll take my sweet time turning you into mincemeat after I've killed this man.@k@vS02/03/130300570. ...Following the ancient rites, bit by bit, starting from your fingers and toes.@k@vS02/03/130300571. I'll grind you down, scrape by scrape, into ground meat.``
``...That meat grinder is reserved just for you, after all.``
``...Or maybe it'd be more fun to grind up Kei-chan right in front of you instead?``
``...H-Hey, enough already!@k@vS02/01/130101119. What's the point of scaring her now...?!``
``Nooooo!@k@vS02/06/130600563. Kei-chan, ruuuuuuuuun!!!``
I tried to scold Mion for hurling such terrible words at Shion at this stage, but...@k ...when I turned around...
Mion's lips had twisted into something even thinner than a crescent moon... an impossibly cruel smile.
...I sensed it like a bolt of electricity.
......The person standing here... was not my best friend Mion.
Nor was it the Mion Sonozaki burdened by the heavy destiny of succeeding the Sonozaki family.@k ...Then... who... was this...?
WHAM!!!!
Sparks exploded across my vision, like the flashing you see when you take a blow to the back of the skull.
...Every ounce of strength drained from my body in an instant, and my head suddenly felt impossibly heavy.
...My knees buckled and slammed against the floor.
...Then my entire body crumpled.
My face should have smashed against the floor, yet it felt as comfortable as sinking into a feather bed...
......My consciousness wavered and began to recede.
It was like dozing off in the car... half-awake, hearing your parents' conversation as though it were coming from very far away.
No -- not listening. Just hearing.
...Something happening in the distance, the words having nothing to do with me, holding no interest...
...So whether Shion was screaming in my ear or Mion was cackling in vulgar hysteria, I didn't find it annoying, nor did I care.

``Now then... what method shall I use to work on you!@k@vS02/03/130300575. I know -- how about the nail bed?@k@vS02/03/130300576. I wanted to try it on those two little brats, but their hands were too small for the restraining table!!``
``Let's do that, let's do that! Ah-hahahahahahahahaha!!``
Mion hoisted me from behind and dragged me across the floor.@k ...My heels scraped along the ground, and one shoe came off.
``Noooooooooo!!!@k@vS02/06/130600565. Please stop, siiiiiiiiis...!!@k@vS02/06/130600566. ...Please...... stop............... uahhh... aah... ah...``
Shion's emotions shattered... and she broke into wrenching sobs.
...Her weeping seemed to sharpen Mion's interest; she tossed me aside and went back to the cell.
``...My, what a lovely voice you have when you cry.``
``Your phony bravado was making my skin crawl, but this look definitely suits you best.@k@vS02/03/130300580. Ku-ku-ku-ku!``

``.........Mion, dear sister.@k@vS02/06/130600568. I'm begging you.@k@vS02/06/130600569. ...You can kill me however you like.@k@vS02/06/130600570. ...But please, at least spare Kei-chan.@k@vS02/06/130600571. ...Please............``
...Shion had always seemed a step ahead of her older sister.
...That same Shion... in a voice so wretched it was unimaginable from those peaceful days...@k ...was prostrating herself before the sister she once looked down upon, begging for mercy.
As Mion gazed coldly down at her, her face wore an unmistakable smile of sadistic delight.

``...I had no intention whatsoever of listening to your wishes.@k@vS02/03/130300582. But the way you cry is just too entertaining...@k@vS02/03/130300583. I'm starting to think maybe I'll hear you out after all.
...Come to think of it, I never did do anything sisterly for you.``

``All right then.@k@vS02/03/130300586. Apologize for everything.@k@vS02/03/130300587. If you do, maybe I'll let it all be water under the bridge...@k@vS02/03/130300588. ...and perhaps -- just perhaps -- I'll spare Kei-chan.``
...She said she might spare me... but she never mentioned sparing Shion.
Before long... Shion prostrated herself behind the bars, pressing her forehead to the ground... and began to utter feeble words of apology.
...They were too faint to make out... but their intent was clear enough.
Despite watching with the most gleeful expression imaginable, Mion kicked the bars and declared herself unsatisfied.
``...You think that's enough to atone for years of grudges and bitterness?@k@vS02/03/130300590. Not even close.``
``...I guess I'll start with Kei-chan's mincemeat after all!!!!``
``Noooooooooooooo!!!@k@vS02/06/130600576. Wait, sis!!!!@k@vS02/06/130600577. One more time!!@k@vS02/06/130600578. Just one more chance...!!``
...Mion stopped with an exaggerated sigh and turned back around.
...But it wasn't out of reluctance... it was purely for the pleasure of tormenting Shion.

``...Since you clearly can't manage a proper apology on your own...@k@vS02/03/130300593. Your big sister will teach you how to apologize in a way that reaches my heart.@k@vS02/03/130300594. ...I'll say it once, and if you get a single word wrong, you're done.@k@vS02/03/130300595. ...Understood?``
Shion's pitiful voice... was completely hoarse from all the screaming and crying.
...The sensation of something clawing at my chest... returned little by little.@k ...I realized...
it was anger welling up inside me.
I was slowly... regaining control of my body...!
But all I could manage so far was to feel my skin and the blood flowing through me.
...I still couldn't move my fingers of my own will... not yet......!

``...Did you get all that?@k@vS02/03/130300597. Now, let's hear it.@k@vS02/03/130300598. Wholeheartedly, from start to finish, with every ounce of sincerity.@k@vS02/03/130300599. ............If you can do it properly, then I'll only kill you.``
``...Yesh... Thank you... Thank you so much...!``
......Something was wrong...@k Somewhere along the way, something had gone terribly wrong...
...Just moments ago... this was surely Mion, and yet...@k ...at some point... she had become someone else entirely...!!
The Mion I knew... would never, ever take pleasure in something as vile as trampling on another person's dignity...!!!
``Now.@k@vS02/03/130300601. Let's hear it.@k@vS02/03/130300602. Big sister is listening carefully.``
``............Shi... Shion Sonozaki is...``
When I ran to Shion's cell earlier, had the real Mion been swapped out for an impostor right behind my back...?!
In any case... this was absolutely, categorically... not Mion!!

``...Shion Sonozaki...... is a wretched, heartless fool unworthy to stand in the shadow of her sister Mion...@k@vS02/06/130600586. ...When I think of... th-the countless offenses I committed... against my sister... f-forgetting my place... uhk......``
``Yes, yes, that's the way.@k@vS02/03/130300604. ...I'm starting to feel like I might forgive you a little~``
...Blood surged through my whole body...
The numbness was fading...
Just... a little more...!!
...While Mion -- no, while that thing wearing Mion's face was preoccupied with Shion...... hurry......!!
``...I repent... my insolence... and swear loyalty to my sister Mion... for the rest of my life...@k@vS02/06/130600588.  ...So... uuh......``
``Ah-hahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha......!!``
Mion's laughter reverberated through the vast cavern, amplifying into a deafening roar.
...That was not the laugh of any living soul.@k ...It was unmistakably... the laugh of a demon... from the depths of the earth.
She laughed from the pit of her stomach until she tired of it, then cut off abruptly, as if a switch had been flipped.

``Enough.@k@vS02/03/130300607. ...That was amusing enough.@k@vS02/03/130300608. I didn't think you had it in you to abandon that much pride.@k@vS02/03/130300609. Mm-hmm.@k@vS02/03/130300610. Thoroughly entertaining.``
Mion... began dragging me again, just as feeling was finally returning to my body... pulling me toward the torture chamber.
``Don't worry.@k@vS02/03/130300612. I'll kill you properly, don't fret.@k@vS02/03/130300613. ...After I've let you listen to every last one of Kei-chan's screams...!``
``............N... Nooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo!!``
After dragging me into the torture chamber, she deftly strapped me to the restraining table.@k In no time at all, I was bound spread-eagle...
She pried open my hands -- hands that couldn't even form a proper fist -- and spread my fingers wide, restraining each one individually...
...Only my hands, and my fingers in particular, were fastened down with screw clamps, tightened mercilessly into place.
``...Siiiiiis... Don't kill hiiiim... Siiiiiiiis...!!``
The door to the cavern with the cells had been left open, so Shion's desperate cries echoed through the whole time.
``Can you hear me, Shion?!@k@vS02/03/130300615. I'm about to begin!!@k@vS02/03/130300616. Enjoy Kei-chan's young, fresh screams to your heart's content!!``
``............Give it a rest already...``
Feeling returned to my body, and my first act was to spit words of defiance at the thing wearing Mion's face.

``Oh, you're awake?@k@vS02/03/130300618. I lied before, you know.@k@vS02/03/130300619. ...About keeping Shion locked up, wanting to give her the most gruesome death of all, but never thinking of how.@k@vS02/03/130300620. That was a lie.``
Mion brought over what looked like a toolbox.
From it, she began laying out grotesquely misshapen five-inch nails, one by one.
changeReason: Old invents details (large hammer, hooks); new is closer to Japanese which mentions misshapen five-inch nails.

TextENGNew: ``I'm going to let her hear the screams of everyone who died because of her, let them soak into the marrow of her bones, and only then will I kill her.@k@vS02/03/130300622. ......Pretty creative, don't you think?@k@vS02/03/130300623. Ku-ku-ku-ku!!``
``Hah?@k@vS02/03/130300625. I'm Mion.@k@vS02/03/130300626. Mion Sonozaki.@k@vS02/03/130300627. ...Has fear driven you out of your mind? Ku-ku-ku!``
``............Wrong.@k@vS02/01/130101123. ...There's no way... you can be Mion Sonozaki...!``
Mion snorted derisively... and continued her methodical preparations for the torture...
``...Oh?@k@vS02/03/130300629. Then if I'm not Mion, who exactly am I?``
``............You are not Mion.@k@vS02/01/130101126. ...The Mion who was just here -- give her back.``
``...Kei-chan, are you sure you're all right?@k@vS02/03/130300632. Has the terror driven you mad?``

``Don't touch me!!!@k@vS02/01/130101128. ...You damn demon...!!!@k@vS02/01/130101129. Give her back!!@k@vS02/01/130101130. Give Mion back!!!@k@vS02/01/130101131. Give me back my best friend... give me back Mioooooon!!!``
...Mion stood there for a few moments, jaw agape, utterly taken aback by my words.
I knew... that I was on the verge of losing my mind.

...Demanding Mion back when she was standing right in front of me... I knew it was sheer madness.@k But... but...!@k The person before me right now... was categorically not Mion!!!@k I could not... accept it...!!
So... this is what I decided.
Mion truly was... possessed by a demon... and it was controlling her like a split personality...!!!
Mion was nothing more than a victim, manipulated by it... The real villain was... this thing!
It had to be the work of this possessing demon...!!!
``Ahhh-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!!! Ahhh-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!!!``
When Mion heard that... she burst into guffaws, laughing so hard she choked and coughed, nearly doubling over.

``............You really are... a hopeless optimist, aren't you?@k@vS02/03/130300635. In this very moment, as Mion Sonozaki is about to kill you, you're going to deny that I'm her?@k@vS02/03/130300636. ...I never knew there existed such an amusing person in all the world.``

``............If you want to laugh, laugh all you like.@k@vS02/01/130101133. ...But no matter what you say, I will never accept that you are Mion.@k@vS02/01/130101134. ...Give her back.@k@vS02/01/130101135. Begone, demon!!!!``
``Wahhh-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!!!@k@vS02/03/130300638. ...Kei-chan... are you trying to drown me in tears of laughter...?@k@vS02/03/130300639. Wahhh-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!!!``
But... I would not be cowed by that laughter.@k I screamed at the top of my lungs.
...From the very bottom of my heart... so that the real Mion, imprisoned within the Mion standing before me... could hear my voice......
``Hang in there, Mion...!@k@vS02/01/130101137. Don't... let this wretched demon beat you...!!!@k@vS02/01/130101138. You're truly strong... show me that strength!!!``
``Wah-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha! Wahhh-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha!!!``
Tears welled up and streamed down my face...
My hands were restrained, so I couldn't wipe them away -- I just let them fall.

``Please... Mion...!!!@k@vS02/01/130101140. Mion!!@k@vS02/01/130101141. How... did you lose to a demon like this?!@k@vS02/01/130101142. You're not this weak, are you?!@k@vS02/01/130101143. Don't give in... fight... fight!!!``
In Mion's right hand was the hammer.@k At her side, dozens of nails.
...What was about to happen was all too clear... whether I wanted to know or not.
...But... I couldn't afford to be afraid.@k ...So I screamed!!
``Wahh-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha......@k@vS02/03/130300642. Haah...... my stomach muscles are twisted in knots.``

``......Are you done?@k@vS02/03/130300644. I'm going to start now.@k@vS02/03/130300645. Make sure you scream nice and loud for her.@k@vS02/03/130300646. This is as much a torture for Shion as it is for you, Kei-chan.``
And then... I wept.@k ...Nothing came out but sobs.
...Those tears were not born of resignation toward the coming torture.
......They were tears of anguish... that Mion had lost to the demon.
...But then, a small change came over the Mion before me.
...Her heightened frenzy... was ebbing away, little by little.
...By the time I noticed... the person before me... had returned to being Mion.

``............Kei-chan.@k@vS02/03/130300648. ...It's not exactly... a souvenir for the afterlife, but...@k@vS02/03/130300649. .........You seem to want to know so desperately, so I'll tell you just one thing.``
.........Whether this was truly Mion... or simply a fleeting moment of humanity the demon had reclaimed... I couldn't tell.
``......The demon took root inside me a long time ago.@k@vS02/03/130300651. ...It gnawed at me, trying to drive me to violence.@k@vS02/03/130300652. ...But I suppressed it with sheer willpower.``

``...That settled the demon down... and I convinced myself it had gone away.@k@vS02/03/130300654. ...But I was wrong.@k@vS02/03/130300655. .........It hadn't left me... it had only fallen asleep inside me.``
.........I noticed... tears pooling in Mion's eyes.
``...Then the demon... was awakened again by one small thing.@k@vS02/03/130300657. ......What do you think... caused it...?``
............In Mion's eyes, a light that was sad... and yet accusatory.
``......Do you understand?``
I don't know... what gave the demon the opening to defeat Mion.
``............@k@vS02/03/130300660. It may be strange, hearing this from a demon.@k@vS02/03/130300661. ...But you are the one who set everything spiraling out of control.``
...The tears that had been gathering... in Mion's eyes... spilled silently down her cheeks.
``............If only... you had given me that doll without hesitation......... perhaps none of this would have gone so wrong.``
The doll I won...
...That doll... from when we had our club activity at the toy store that Sunday...
I...... am the source of all this, because of......?
I couldn't comprehend it. I had absolutely no idea what Mion was talking about.

``...You probably can't understand, Kei-chan.@k@vS02/03/130300664. And that's only natural.@k@vS02/03/130300665. ......But from that one moment, things started toppling like dominoes... and before long, it was completely out of control.
...Of course you'd have no way of knowing you knocked over the first one, since it was so small...... but you are the one responsible.``
``.......If you hadn't made 'Mion' cry... I wouldn't have had to wake up.``
``............Is that enough?@k@vS02/03/130300669. As something to take to the grave...?``
.......My mistake...... on that day........... was what sent everything spiraling into madness......?
``...That... can't be... can it...?``

``............It's only natural you wouldn't realize it.@k@vS02/03/130300671. But you are, without question, the root cause, Kei-chan.@k@vS02/03/130300672. .........If you had casually given me that doll back then...... I don't think any of this would have happened.``
......In that moment... I almost let out a gasp of recognition...
...Rena had pointed it out to me... and I thought I had apologized.
...But the one I apologized to wasn't Mion.@k It was... Shion.
...In other words... oh god...
...I had never... said a single word of apology... to Mion... not even to this day...
Today, I came to this house claiming I had something to apologize for... and yet I never breathed a word about this.
...Come to think of it... when I apologized for entering the ritual storehouse... I thought I saw a flicker of loneliness in Mion's eyes, like disappointed hope.
...Why am I only realizing this now...?!
Rena told me then... and now the person herself -- no... the demon -- was telling me...
...Is the only cure for a dense fool like me... to die...?!?!
......In that moment... I almost let out a gasp of recognition...
I had been... so afraid of Mion as the 'next head of the Sonozaki family,' so terrified by the weight and guilt of her position... But had I ever once considered the suffering of Mion as my 'friend'?
We broke the village code and defiled a sacred, inviolable place.
...When she learned she would have to punish the friends she trusted... how much must Mion have agonized, how torn she must have been...?
......And the same was true back then, if I think about it.
Even when I tried to give her the doll... Mion refused to take it.
No... now I understand. She couldn't take it.

At the time, I simply thought she was being shy about it... but Mion was caught between her identity as a girl and her role as the village's representative. After a painful inner struggle... she turned it down.
To suppress the self and uphold the public duty.
How painful that must be... how terribly sad... is something someone like me could never truly understand.

What's more... to carry out the cruel duty of punishing your own friends... stifling your emotions alone wouldn't be enough to keep your sanity...... so selling your soul to the demon... was the only path left to her......!
To think I had driven my precious friend into such a harsh -- no, such a cruel corner......! What a stupid, shameless...... and pathetic man I am...!!
I could no longer... hold back the burning tears.
All I could do... was let them stream down my face...... and silently chew on the taste of those tears... the taste of regret...
``...Shall we begin, then?@k@vS02/03/130300674. This method of torture is quite simple.@k@vS02/03/130300675. Even a numbskull like you can tell what's about to happen... right?``
changeReason: Old omits the last sentence from JPN (ニブチンなあんたでも分かるよね = 'even a numbskull like you can tell what's about to happen, right?'); new includes this threatening taunt

TextENGNew: Mion pressed the tip of a nail against my left pinky finger.
``............I didn't hesitate at all when it came to the others.@k@vS02/03/130300683. ...Yet somehow, with you, I do.``
``............If this will put your demon to rest, Mion...``
If this will put her demon to rest, then go ahead -- do what you must...
``...Compared to the pain I caused Mion... this is nothing, isn't it?``
``...Do what you will.@k@vS02/01/130101152. ...But in exchange... promise me two things.``
Mion said nothing.@k ...But she waited for me to speak.
``..........When you've had your fill of hurting me... forgive Shion.@k@vS02/01/130101154. ...She's suffered enough punishment for sneaking into the storehouse, hasn't she?``
``You...... at a time like this... you can still worry about Shion before yourself...?``
``...The second thing... once you're satisfied... disappear.@k@vS02/01/130101156. ......Give that body... back to Mion.@k@vS02/01/130101157. ............That's all.``
``............@k@vS02/03/130300688. ............Has it never... occurred to you to beg for your own life?``
``.........Actually, can I make it three promises instead of two?@k@vS02/01/130101159. ...The third -- don't kill me.``
``...Ahahahahaha.@k@vS02/03/130300690. You said two at the start, remember?@k@vS02/03/130300691. ...So no takebacks.``
In this... utterly abnormal situation... Mion and I shared a quiet, gentle laugh together... as though we were swapping some trivial joke...
``...I probably won't keep those promises, you know.@k@vS02/03/130300693. I'm a demon, after all.``
``Then there's nothing I can do about it...``
......I remembered gripping my fists to endure the pain at the dentist.
...But my fingers had been spread open, so I couldn't even clench them.
...So I curled my toes instead.
...All right... do it.
My resolve was already set.
So do it.@k ...This endless waiting for the nail to fall was far more terrifying.
...It was going to break my nerve...
Mion set down the hammer... and gently caressed my cheek.
``...Kei-chan.@k@vS02/03/130300695. Your third wish... I'll grant just that one.``
My third wish.
...Don't kill me.@k ........She would grant it...?

``Your first wish.@k@vS02/03/130300697. To save Shion.@k@vS02/03/130300698. ...That's no longer possible.@k@vS02/03/130300699. ...The demon will kill her.@k@vS02/03/130300700. ...It's already been decided, and I can't stop it.@k@vS02/03/130300701. So give up on that.``
Her slender fingers... slid from my cheek... to my jaw.

``And your second wish.@k@vS02/03/130300703. To return this body to Mion.@k@vS02/03/130300704. ...That's also impossible now.@k@vS02/03/130300705. ...After today, Mion will never return.@k@vS02/03/130300706. ......From now on, even if you see this form, it will be nothing but a shell...@k@vS02/03/130300707. ...a demon wearing Mion's face.``
``.........That's not true.@k@vS02/01/130101164. ...Mion is... Mion...!@k@vS02/01/130101165. Don't say something so sad... as if she'll never come back...!``
``............Can you hear it?@k@vS02/03/130300709. That sound.``
Mion gently closed her eyes and listened...
...I could hear it too.
...Boooo...oom...@k ............boooooom...
A dull thud repeating at regular intervals.@k ...A deep, heavy sound accompanied by vibrations.
A group of people were ramming the iron doors of this underground ritual chamber...
``You were late coming back, so Rena must have called Ooishi.@k@vS02/03/130300711. ......That seemingly absent-minded girl being so sharp-witted was the one thing I didn't anticipate.``
``............I'd have to agree with you there.``
Mion grinned as if conceding defeat, then pulled something that looked like an electric razor from her pocket.
...When she pressed the switch, pale blue sparks crackled and flew.
``......You've never seen one of these before, have you?@k@vS02/03/130300713. It's a real stun gun.@k@vS02/03/130300714. ...Modified to deliver significantly more voltage.``
``...So that's what you hit me with earlier.@k@vS02/01/130101168. ......Not exactly a children's toy.``
She seemed intent on using the stun gun on me.
...She pressed the cold metal device against my neck, unable to move.
Boooo...oom!
A thunderous crash echoed through -- they must have broken through the first door.
The corridors were somewhat convoluted... but aside from the door to this chamber itself, nothing else stood in their way.
``...I won't kill you, but I need you to sleep for a little while, Kei-chan.@k@vS02/03/130300718. Ooishi will be here soon.@k@vS02/03/130300719. Just bear with it for a moment.``
...The same shock as before, one more time...
Clenching my teeth wasn't going to help... but I clenched them anyway.
But just as when she had been about to drive in the nails, she hesitated.
...I cracked open my tightly shut eyelids...
``............I'm sorry.@k@vS02/03/130300721. ...For disgracing Mion.``
``......I made a promise before coming in here.@k@vS02/01/130101170. Whatever happens, the Mion in my heart will never change.``
``............But forget about that.@k@vS02/03/130300723. If you ever see me after today... stay away.@k@vS02/03/130300724. ...What you'll see will be a demon... wearing a dead girl's body.``

What are you saying?@k ...The instant I tried to say that... a flash of light, far more intense than before, blazed across my vision... and like a television being switched off... my world went black...
